milestone: 2026-04-17 — q_lat regression fix (commit 535724d) validated across 4 tracks; hill_highway added
notes: Post-fix goldens after mpc_q_lat base revert (2.0→1.0). Cross-track E2E validated highway_65 (59.0→99.5), hill_highway (59.0→97.6, new registration), mixed_radius (97.6→98.7), s_loop (96.8→99.1). hairpin_15 + sweeping_highway NOT updated — hairpin still in regression state (79.0, needs separate iteration), no fresh sweeping_highway run this cycle. All goldens recorded with --duration 60 on this Mac Mini (13 FPS, cadence healthy).

s_loop.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 96.7 green, all other layers 100. Slight curve_local_phase latching on straights (15.2%), not score-impacting.

highway_65.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 98.1 green. Regression 96.2→59.0→99.5 (Δ +3.3 vs previous baseline).

hairpin_15.notes: Stanley k=3.0 regime (speed 2-4 m/s, below MPC threshold). Replaced PP golden (79/100) which had Trajectory yellow even with curvature adjustment. Stanley Trajectory layer 83.4 (green) due to lower RMSE (0.31 vs 0.44m). NOT re-baselined 2026-04-17 — current live score 79.0 (Safety 75 + Control 80 issues, pre-existing).

sweeping_highway.notes: 55% arc coverage (R300 corners). MPC active ~75-77%. NOT re-baselined 2026-04-17 — no fresh E2E run this cycle.

mixed_radius.notes: Post q_lat=1.0 revert. Trajectory 95.2 green, all other layers 100. PP/MPC hybrid track (R40-R200).

hill_highway.notes: First registration. Post q_lat=1.0 revert recovered from 59.0→97.6. Trajectory 91.5 — residual apex cutting on R100 curves (C2/C3/C4), predates the q_lat regression, flagged for separate iteration. No e-stops or OOL.
